stemHtml: Which of the following assessments in regard to icing and turbulence is true for the main cloud genera altostratus (AS) and altocumulus (AC)?

options.a: Flights in AS and AC may result in icing, AC has a higher probability for turbulence than AS.
options.b: Both AS and AC are medium level clouds. The probability for turbulence and icing is low.
options.c: AS has a higher probability for icing and turbulence than AC.
options.d: In both types, the threat of icing is high, whereas the chance for turbulence is low.
